remote.page.title: Remote Development
remote.page.subtitle: Set up remote workflow with VS Code / Web IDE / AI tools
remote.need_conn.title: Connection Required
remote.need_conn.desc: The feature "{tool_name}" requires an SSH connection to a Jetson device.
remote.need_conn.steps:
1. Go to the Device Connection card on this page.
2. Enter device IP, username and password.
3. Connect first, then try this feature again.
remote.api.title: Claude API Configuration
remote.api.desc: Used by Skills AI execution via claude-sonnet.
remote.api_key.title: Configure Anthropic API Key
remote.api_key.desc:
API key is used for Skills AI execution.
Get it from console.anthropic.com
remote.api_key.warn.title: Notice
remote.api_key.warn.short: API key format is invalid (too short).
remote.api_key.info.saved_body: API key has been saved to local config.
remote.api_test.title: API Test
remote.conn.title: Device Connection
remote.conn.sudo_placeholder: Leave empty to reuse login password
remote.conn.warn.ip_required: Please enter device IP or hostname first.
remote.scan.no_hosts: No reachable SSH hosts found on LAN
remote.init.title: Jetson Initialization
remote.init.desc: After flashing, complete first boot setup through serial console before SSH workflow.
remote.init.ports.hint: Recommended: open {port} and press Enter to continue first boot setup.
remote.init.ports.none_hint: Connect serial cable and power on the device, then retry.
remote.tools.title: Developer Tools
remote.tools.vscode_ssh.name: VS Code Remote SSH
remote.tools.vscode_ssh.desc: Edit Jetson code in local VS Code over SSH
remote.tools.vscode_ssh.note: Requires VS Code + Remote SSH extension
remote.tools.vscode_web.name: VS Code Server (Web)
remote.tools.vscode_web.desc: Run code-server on Jetson and access via browser
remote.tools.claude_api.name: Claude / AI Assistant
remote.tools.claude_api.desc: Use Claude API for AI-assisted development
remote.tools.claude_api.note: Configure Anthropic API Key before testing
remote.tools.jupyter.name: Jupyter Lab
remote.tools.jupyter.desc: Run Jupyter on Jetson and access from browser
remote.tools.remote_desktop.name: Remote Desktop
remote.tools.agent_install.name: AI Agent Install
remote.tools.agent_install.desc: Install Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw on Jetson via SSH
remote.tools.agent_install.note: Node.js and selected agents are installed automatically
remote.vscode_ssh.title: VS Code Remote SSH Guide
remote.vscode_ssh.steps:
Step 1: Install VS Code.
Step 2: Install extension "Remote - SSH".
Step 3: Run "Remote-SSH: Connect to Host" and use:

{ssh_addr}

Step 4: Enter Jetson password.
Step 5: Open remote folder and start coding.
remote.vscode_web.title: VS Code Server (Web) Deploy
remote.vscode_web.desc: Install and start code-server on Jetson ({ip}).
remote.jupyter_launch.title: Jupyter Lab Install & Start
remote.jupyter_launch.desc: Install and start Jupyter Lab on Jetson ({ip}).
remote.desktop.title: Remote Desktop
remote.desktop.desc:
Deploy VNC + noVNC on Jetson ({ip}) with one click.
After deployment, access desktop via browser or VNC client.
If HDMI is not connected, a headless virtual display will be created.
remote.desktop.deploy.autologin: GDM auto-login configuration has been ensured.
remote.desktop.deploy.tip1: - x11vnc requires a desktop environment (GNOME/XFCE) and login.
remote.desktop.deploy.tip2: - In headless mode, :99 virtual display is created. Check /tmp/seeed-xvfb.log
remote.desktop.deploy.tip6: - Ensure Jetson has internet access for apt-get
remote.desktop.vnc_client.title: VNC Client
remote.desktop.vnc_client.body:
No VNC client detected.

VNC address: {addr}

Recommended:
- Linux: sudo apt install tigervnc-viewer or remmina
- Windows: RealVNC Viewer
- Or use browser desktop via noVNC
remote.net_share.title: PC Network Share
remote.net_share.desc:
Share PC internet to Jetson so Jetson can access internet through PC.
PC should have one WAN interface and one LAN interface connected to Jetson.
remote.net_share.tip: Tip: after enabling NAT, gateway and DNS will be configured on Jetson through SSH automatically. If SSH is not connected, configure Jetson gateway manually to PC LAN IP.
remote.net_share.jetson_ip: Current Jetson IP: {ip} (LAN auto-matched from SSH connection)
remote.net_share.warn.select_ifaces: Please select WAN and LAN interfaces.
remote.net_share.warn.same_iface: WAN and LAN interfaces cannot be the same.
remote.net_share.gateway.placeholder_cmd: sudo bash -lc '<configure gateway and DNS here>'
remote.net_share.gateway.no_ssh: ⚠ SSH is not connected, Jetson gateway cannot be configured automatically.
remote.net_share.gateway.no_lan_ip: ⚠ Cannot get LAN interface IP ({lan}), auto configuration skipped.
remote.net_share.gateway.configuring: Configuring Jetson gateway via SSH -> {lan_ip}, DNS -> 8.8.8.8 ...
remote.net_share.gateway.ping_failed: ⚠ Gateway configured, but ping 8.8.8.8 failed. Check whether PC-side NAT is working.
remote.net_share.time_sync.unknown: ⚠ Time sync attempted, final state unclear: {out}
remote.net_share.proxy.not_detected: ℹ No local proxy detected on PC, skipping proxy setup
remote.net_share.close_running_body:
Closing this dialog will not stop network sharing.
Disable sharing before closing?
remote.agent_install.title: AI Agent Install (Jetson)
remote.agent_install.description:
Install AI coding assistant CLIs on Jetson via SSH.
After installation, use them directly in Jetson terminal.
remote.agent_install.agent.claude.desc: Anthropic official terminal AI coding assistant
remote.agent_install.agent.codex.desc: OpenAI official terminal AI coding assistant
remote.agent_install.select_agent_requir: Please select at least one agent.
remote.agent_install.tip.permissions: - Retry install command manually if npm permission fails

remote.jetson_init.subtitle: After flashing, complete first-boot setup via serial.
remote.jetson_init.no_external_terminal: No external terminal tool found. Use built-in terminal.
remote.jetson_init.release_confirm: Try to release this port lock?
remote.jetson_init.select_port_first: Please select a serial port first.
remote.jetson_net_config.title: Jetson Network Config
remote.jetson_net_config.subtitle: Login over serial and configure static IP.
remote.jetson_net_config.release_confirm: Try to release this port lock?
remote.jetson_net_config.select_port_fir: Please select a serial port first.
remote.jetson_net_config.apply_maybe_fai: Configuration may have failed. Check logs.
